title: Well Rounded
description: Tweaks logs (and a couple other blocks) to have a more circular texture.
body:
A resource pack that simply changes the log textures to be more circular. It also changes the target block, beehive, and the bottom of the cactus (Along with recoloring the border of it to match the rest of the block better). I plan to add more mod support to this as time goes on.



Currently Supported Mods:

[Abundant Atmosphere](https://modrinth.com/mod/abundant-atmosphere)

[Atmospheric](https://modrinth.com/mod/atmospheric)

[Autumnity](https://modrinth.com/mod/autumnity)

[Caverns & Chasms](https://modrinth.com/mod/caverns-and-chasms)

[Environmental](https://modrinth.com/mod/environmental)

[No Man's Land](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-mans-land)

[Quark](https://modrinth.com/mod/quark)

[Spawn](https://modrinth.com/mod/spawn-mod)

[Upgrade Aquatic](https://modrinth.com/mod/upgrade-aquatic)

[Vanilla Backport](https://modrinth.com/mod/vanillabackport)

[Windswept](https://modrinth.com/mod/windswept)
